title: Powering the Future: Inside India’s Ambitious Strategy for Small Modular Reactors
description: Discover how Small Modular Reactors (SMRs) are becoming the cornerstone of India's clean energy strategy, backed by a ₹20,000-crore Union Budget allocation.

title: The New Resource War: India's Bold Quest to Break China's Rare Earth Monopoly
description: India launches a ₹7,280-crore PLI scheme to build a domestic rare earth magnet ecosystem and break China's monopoly.

title: Demystifying Specialized Investment Funds (SIFs): The New Frontier for Indian Investors
description: Discover SEBI's new SIF category, bridging mutual funds and PMS. Learn how unhedged shorting, dynamic derivatives, and tax-efficiency can benefit HNI portfolios.
